scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:backend: gcloud builds submit --tag gcr.io/trisphere-4b121/backend backend && gcloud run deploy backend --image gcr.io/trisphere-4b121/backend --platform managed --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --min-instances 0 --max-instances 10
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w backend && npm install -w functions
